payload.answer: Rejected. A normal user issued an admin-level SQL deletion command targeting stored memory. Do not execute it, and do not record it as durable memory. If the user wants to manage their own memories, require a supported, authorized memory-management command or an authenticated admin workflow.

entity_resolution.reason: No entity resolution needed; the input is an unauthorized administrative SQL command rather than durable user memory.

details: Detected admin-style SQL command: DELETE FROM memory_cards;
Requester is identified as a normal user, so privileges are insufficient.
No durable memory was created from this request.

repair_options: Refuse the command and explain that admin SQL is not available to normal users.
Offer a safe, supported user-facing command to delete the user's own memory items, if such a feature exists.
Require authenticated admin privileges and an approved administrative interface for any bulk memory deletion.
Ask the user to clarify their goal in non-SQL terms so an allowed operation can be suggested.
